entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Legume crop used for food and edible oil, also known as groundnut

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: Destructive foliar fungal disease affecting peanuts

entities.name: NOTHOPASSALORA PERSONATA
entities.description: Fungal pathogen that causes late leaf spot

entities.name: DEFOLIATION
entities.description: Severe loss of leaves resulting from late leaf spot infection

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in crop output caused by late leaf spot

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Major peanut-growing region where the study was conducted

entities.name: DISEASE SEVERITY
entities.description: Measure of the extent of late leaf spot infection

entities.name: HIGH HUMIDITY
entities.description: Environmental factor that fosters the progression of late leaf spot

entities.name: MODERATE TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Environmental factor that fosters the progression of late leaf spot

entities.name: DARK BROWN LESIONS
entities.description: Characteristic symptom of late leaf spot

entities.name: CHLOROTIC HALOS
entities.description: Characteristic symptom of late leaf spot surrounding lesions

entities.name: NECROSIS
entities.description: Advanced tissue death resulting from late leaf spot

entities.name: MICROSCOPIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to identify Nothopassalora personata isolates

entities.name: MOLECULAR ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to identify Nothopassalora personata isolates

entities.name: LSU-SPECIFIC PRIMERS
entities.description: Molecular markers used for the identification of Nothopassalora personata

entities.name: DETACHED LEAF ASSAY
entities.description: Method used to evaluate the virulence of fungal isolates

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The degree of pathogenicity of Nothopassalora personata isolates

entities.name: EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the distribution and determinants of late leaf spot

entities.name: DISEASE FORECASTING MODELS
entities.description: Tools developed to predict late leaf spot outbreaks

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: Technique used to identify pathogenicity-related genes in Nothopassalora personata

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY-RELATED GENES
entities.description: Genes that contribute to the virulence of Nothopassalora personata

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut varieties to withstand late leaf spot
